description_long: This is a single-story modern house with a rectangular footprint, surrounded by a well-maintained lawn and several trees. The house features a flat roof and a mix of open and enclosed spaces, with visible interior rooms arranged in a linear fashion. The exterior walls are primarily light-colored, with some sections featuring darker accents, likely for visual contrast. Large windows are distributed asymmetrically along the facade, allowing for ample natural light. The property is enclosed by a fence, and a paved driveway leads up to the main entrance. The landscaping includes both grassy areas and paved walkways, enhancing the curb appeal.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, light exterior walls, large asymmetrical windows, and a landscaped yard with trees and a driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, and a clear view of the lawn and trees flanking the house.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat roof, fence, and the linear arrangement of rooms with visible window placements.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, additional trees, and the back facade with more windows and access points.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the fence, side yard, and the overall length of the house with its flat roof and landscaping.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a simple door, paved steps, and minimal overhang, flanked by landscaping and a driveway.
